notes: 50% off regular admission for up to 4. Redeem at Harvard Museum of Natural History or Peabody Museum of Archaeology & Ethnology. Includes all 4 HMSC museums. Returnable physical pass.
raw: 617-495-3045 Each pass admits up to four people at 50% off regular admission rates. Includes access to all four HMSC museums: Annual membership of $200.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library. Physical (must be picked up at the library and returned) passes are available.
